description:
Time passes and Bertia enrolls at Halm Academy, the same school as Cecil. At the same time, Heronia, the heroine of the otome game, also enrolls there. Wishing for a happy ending for Cecil, Bertia fights to bring the two of them together.
Source: Crunchyroll

titles.title: An Observation Log of a Self-Proclaimed Villainess and Entering School.
Mein Beobachtungsbericht der Einschulung der selbsternannten Widersacherin.
